About
readme.txt
TikTok SoundCloud Bandcamp Gumroad

reyadreamer is a hardware-driven synthpop producer and artist operating within the Utopian Scholastic creative universe — a world where Encarta-era internet nostalgia collides with 80s retrowave and early digital aesthetics.

Built from vintage keyboards, analog circuits, and an obsession with the forgotten sound of pre-internet digital culture. The sound draws from machines that were already considered outdated when they were bought — Korg DSS-1s, DX7s, Roland tape echos — and the unnameable feeling of loading software from a floppy disk in a room no one else knew existed.

Sample packs, original music, and hardware experiments. Based in Jacksonville, Florida. World-building through sound.

Korg DSS-1 · Yamaha DX7 · Korg DS-8 · Behringer Pro-800 · Poly D
Roland SDE-1000 · Focusrite Clarett 8Pre · Tascam 424 Portastudio
